stories.title: Foundation: storage keys, relay helper, Advanced section shell
stories.description: Add new STORAGE_KEYS entries (lp_relays_v1, lp_signerMode_v1, lp_nip46Session_v1). Create getEffectiveRelays() helper. Add the collapsible Advanced section shell to settings.tsx with toggle only (no inner content yet). Add i18n keys for advanced section heading and toggle text.

stories.title: Relay management UI + live pool apply + relay propagation
stories.description: Implement relay list UI inside Advanced (show, add, remove, reset, connection status). Save applies live to NDK pool. Route all DEFAULT_RELAYS usages in MarmotContext, NdkNetworkAdapter, relayBackup through getEffectiveRelays(). Re-publish kind 30051 and key packages on relay list save.

stories.title: Identity/signing split: signer mode state, local-key gating, danger zone
stories.description: Extend NostrIdentityContext to track signerMode ('local'|'nip46'|'nip07') from lp_signerMode_v1. Add EventSigner factory stubs for nip46 and nip07 in signerAdapter.ts. Add applyNdkSigner(signer) to ndkClient.ts. Hide backup/restore in non-local mode. Wire danger-zone device wipe (resetAllData) behind explicit confirmation in Advanced.

stories.title: NIP-46 bunker connect: QR, paste, session, offline, disconnect, identity switch
stories.description: Implement full NIP-46 bunker connect flow. nostrconnect:// QR + bunker:// paste. Permission enumeration. Session persist/restore (lp_nip46Session_v1). 15s timeout + read-only fallback. Disconnect returns to local. Differing-pubkey identity switch warning (backup gate). Honesty disclosure. Re-init MarmotContext on mode switch (AC-SIGNER-10).

stories.title: NIP-07 browser extension signer
stories.description: Implement nip07 signer mode. Detect window.nostr.nip44 at connect time and refuse with clear error if absent. Wrap NDKNip07Signer in EventSigner adapter exposing .nip44 sub-object. Show clear error if no extension installed.

stories.title: E2E tests, i18n completeness, npub-only verification
stories.description: Write Playwright e2e tests covering: Advanced collapse/expand, relay add/remove/reset/last-relay-block, relay save applies to pool, danger-zone wipe, npub-only invariant. Write i18n unit test for advanced section. Verify AC-NPUB-1 (no hex pubkey anywhere in Advanced).
